steps.title: Convert miles to gallons
steps.content:
The van gets $32$ miles per gallon, so each mile uses $\frac{1}{32}$ gallon. Driving $d$ miles uses
$$\frac{d}{32}$$
gallons.

steps.title: Subtract the gas used
steps.content:
The tank starts with $12$ gallons, and the function should give the gas remaining after driving $d$ miles.
$$f(d)=12-\frac{d}{32}$$
The answer is C.
